title: Principal Plant Manager at Havells India Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Principal Plant Manager at Havells India Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Havells India Consulting Pvt Ltd is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Amritsar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Havells India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Havells India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Havells India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
